synthesis.driver: Iran's attacks on Hormuz shipping are lifting Brent, but oversupply limits the spike.
synthesis.based_on: Donald Trump has no good options for reopening the Strait of Hormuz

takes.donald trump has no good options for reo: US inability to stabilize Hormuz prolongs war-risk premium, keeping prices elevated.
takes.live updates iran war news iran targets: Iran's targeting of shipping escalates risks, supporting a rise in oil prices.
takes.falling gas prices cut inflation last mo: Renewed Iran conflict offsets inflation relief, sustaining upward pressure on oil prices.
takes.explosions heard across iran state media: Explosions and tanker hits in Hormuz escalate tensions, driving oil prices higher.
